lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: Ah— thank goodness…

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: My name is Wendy.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: A giant robot broke into my father's workshop and stole his engine core.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: An engine core?

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: It powers everything in our workshop. Without it... we can't survive here anymore.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: The robots suddenly started targeting energy systems recently.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: ...Almost like someone changed their priorities.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: It's like they're searching for something.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: Just like me, I'm searching for satellite fragments.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: They're said to contain the power needed to destroy VOXTRON.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: ...Satellite fragments…

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: Then we're both looking for something important.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: I'll help you recover the engine core first.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: You would really do that?

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: I can't ignore people in danger.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: ...Heh. Then maybe the stories about the princess are true after all.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: Where did that giant robot go?

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: It went through the dark alley, that way.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: Please be careful.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: That giant robot went through the dark alley, that way.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: You actually got it back…?

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: Is this your father's engine?

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: Yeah…

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: My father built it himself.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: He believed robots were meant to help people, not control them.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: A satellite fragment…

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: So the prophecy was real after all.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: If you're really searching for the remaining fragments…

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: Then let me help you.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: I know this city better than anyone left here.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: ...Alright.

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: But this journey will only become more dangerous from here.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: Heh…

lines.speaker: Princess Tria
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: I'll help you find the remaining fragments.

lines.speaker: Wendy
lines.text: I know this city better than anyone left here.
